hubSubtitle: Handy calculators for your business — available free to all registered users.

currency.name: Currency calculator
currency.desc: Convert EUR ↔ BGN at the fixed rate and other currencies.

salary.name: Salary calculator
salary.desc: Gross/net, social contributions and income tax.

vat.name: VAT calculator
vat.desc: Calculate VAT, net and gross amounts.

interest.name: Interest calculator
interest.desc: Simple and compound interest for a chosen period.

markup.name: Markup & profit
markup.desc: Calculate markup, margin and final price.

fixedNote: The EUR/BGN rate is fixed: 1 EUR = {rate} лв.
estNote: Rates (except EUR/BGN) are approximate and subject to change.
salaryNote: The values are approximate and depend on the labor category, the size of the insurable income and specific circumstances. They do not constitute accounting advice.
